text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky and King Halo are playing a game of
shogi in the classroom.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're wide open! I'll have you in check with this
next one!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ack... This isn't looking good.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! My forces need only to advance, all
while my king looks on from the safety of his
throne!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A comfortable, yet first-rate victory! Accept your
defeat with dignity, Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A first-rate king observing from his throne, huh?
You really okay with that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...What are you implying?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I was just wondering whether victory
alone would be enough for a first-rate gal like
yourself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I... I won't fall for any of your ruses. You've always
got some manner of scheme afoot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, can't you hear them? Your pawns are
calling out to you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: "As we fight for supremacy on this battlefield..."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh, my plan's ruined... I guess this is it...

text_block_list.name: King's Silver General
text_block_list.text:
Our enemy is on the brink of defeat! Please, my
liege, deliver the final blow!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The king remains on the throne! I need not dirty
my hands!

text_block_list.name: King's Silver General
text_block_list.text:
The enemy's morale is low, this is the perfect
moment to strike! Demonstrate your might by
personally ending the battle!

text_block_list.name: King's Silver General
text_block_list.text: O King! Show us your glory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Y-you truly wish to see me finish this?

text_block_list.name: King's Silver General
text_block_list.text:
King! King! King! Our lord, O great King! Our
first-rate King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, heheh! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Very well! Then bear witness to the
majesty of this first-rate ruler!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Soldiers, feast your eyes upon me! I grant you the
right to share tales of this day with your children,
and theirs alike!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Th-this is bad! All forces, retreat! Retreat!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...They say, pretending to retreat.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now, troops! Ambush them!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Forces
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! I-impossible! How did you surround me so
quickly?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Such a shame... All righty, King. I think you're
gonna have to show us what a gracious defeat
looks like.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Blast!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Graciously accepting defeat? How foolish. Do
you truly believe that to be appropriate behavior
for a first-rate king?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you wish for my head, come and take it! But be
prepared to taste my blade!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha. I knew you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I've already won. ♪

In only a few moves, Seiun Sky deftly lures King
Halo's king into danger, then snatches a
come-from-behind victory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! Next time... Next time...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Victory will be MIIINE!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There she goes. Well, that's King for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There she goes. Well, that's King for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You're right about that. It makes her a real
pain to handle head-on.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There! I've calmed my emotions!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Face me once more, Sky! I challenge you to a
game of chess!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...What did I tell ya?

Forced to play against King Halo again, Seiun
Sky's energy gradually fades. But she also seems
to be enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I thought the same at first, but... can you
really call that a weakness?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I get how others might think so, but I have a
different point of view.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I could work it into a strategy someday...
Haha.

With a profound look on her face, Seiun Sky
smiles as she gazes at King Halo storming off.
